title: The z Family
subtitle: Folding, scrolling, spell. The most thematically scattered prefix.
summary: z handles three loosely-related families: scroll positioning (zz, zt, zb), folding (zo, zc, zf, zR), and spell suggestions (z=, zg, zw).

blocks.text: The {key:z} prefix is even more scattered than {key:g}. Three separate families share the prefix because Vim ran out of one-key real estate: scrolling, folding, and spell-checking.

blocks.title: The Three Sub-Families
blocks.text:
**Scrolling** — {key:z}{key:z}, {key:z}{key:t}, {key:z}{key:b}, {key:z}{key:.}, {key:z}{key:+}, {key:z}{key:-}, {key:z}{key:s}, {key:z}{key:e}, {key:z}{key:h}, {key:z}{key:l}, {key:z}{key:H}, {key:z}{key:L}, {key:z}{n}{key:Enter}. Cover the viewport — see [`scroll.center-top-bottom`](#scroll.center-top-bottom) and [`scroll.horizontal`](#scroll.horizontal).

**Folding** — {key:z}{key:o}/{key:z}{key:c} (open/close fold), {key:z}{key:O}/{key:z}{key:C} (recursive), {key:z}{key:R}/{key:z}{key:M} (reduce/more — open/close all), {key:z}{key:r}/{key:z}{key:m} (one level), {key:z}{key:a} (toggle), {key:z}{key:f}{motion} (create), {key:z}{key:d} (delete), {key:z}{key:E} (eliminate all). Cover folding — see [`advanced.folding`](#advanced.folding).

**Spell** — {key:z}{key:=} (suggestions for misspelled word under cursor), {key:z}{key:g} (mark word as correct), {key:z}{key:w} (mark as wrong), {key:z}{key:u}{key:g}/{key:z}{key:u}{key:w} (undo each).
